scripts.pages:preview: pnpm build && wrangler pages dev out
scripts.cf:bootstrap:vector: sh -c 'wrangler vectorize info annapod-memory >/dev/null 2>&1 || wrangler vectorize create annapod-memory --dimensions=1536 --metric=cosine'
scripts.cf:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply annapod --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.cf:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply annapod --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.cf:deploy: pnpm build && wrangler pages deploy out --project-name annapod --config wrangler.jsonc
